metadata.name: Eco Tree #1
metadata.description: Plant a tree in Central Park. Trees absorb CO2 and provide habitat for wildlife.
metadata.companionHint: 🐝 Busy Bee loves helping plant trees!
metadata.environmentalImpact: 1 tree planted = ~48 lbs CO2 absorbed per year

metadata.name: Recycling Station
metadata.description: Sort recyclables at Times Square. Proper recycling reduces landfill waste.
metadata.companionHint: 🦊 Forest Fox appreciates your recycling efforts!
metadata.environmentalImpact: 1 recycling trip = ~5 lbs waste diverted from landfills

metadata.name: Cleanup Zone
metadata.description: Collect litter at Battery Park. Keep our parks clean for everyone!
metadata.companionHint: 🐢 Sea Turtle thanks you for cleaning up!

metadata.name: Wildflower Garden
metadata.description: Plant native wildflowers near Empire State. Support local pollinators!
metadata.companionHint: 🐝 Busy Bee is excited about wildflowers!
metadata.environmentalImpact: 100 wildflowers = support for 1000s of bees and butterflies

metadata.name: Water Conservation Point
metadata.description: Check water quality at Union Square. Clean water is essential for all life.
metadata.companionHint: 🐢 Sea Turtle guides you to protect waterways!

metadata.name: Wildlife Habitat
metadata.description: Build a birdhouse in Roosevelt Park. Provide homes for local birds!
metadata.companionHint: 🐦 Song Bird wants to help you build habitats!
metadata.environmentalImpact: 1 birdhouse = home for 1 bird family per season

gameInfo.description: FediQuest encourages people to go outside, help each other, and do something good for the environment.
gameInfo.rewards: Earn XP, unlock avatar skins, discover companions, and track your environmental impact!
gameInfo.fediverseIntegration: Share your achievements to any ActivityPub-compatible instance
